# Cyril Liu / 刘柏希

> Business-facing PMO and Program & Portfolio Management Lead with experience in program governance, global payments, international market launches, growth portfolios, and AI-enabled operating workflows.

刘柏希是一名业务型 PMO 与项目集管理负责人，长期处理项目治理、全球支付、国际化落地、增长项目组合与 AI 辅助工作流。

- Program and portfolio governance
- Executive reporting and risk escalation
